title: Expert Witness Case Assessment | Free Legal Assessment Tool
description: Answer four quick questions to find out whether you need an expert witness psychologist or psychiatrist for your case — and get matched within 24 hours.
keywords: do I need a psychological expert witness

blocks.headline: Does Your Case Need an Expert Witness?
blocks.subtitle: Tell us about your case in four steps. We'll assess whether expert psychological or psychiatric evidence is likely to be required — and match you with the right expert within 24 hours.

faqs.question: How accurate is this assessment tool?
faqs.answer: The tool is based on well-established legal principles and case law for each area of practice. It provides a general indication — not legal advice. If you are uncertain, call us and a Client Manager will discuss your specific case at no cost.

faqs.question: What happens after I submit my details?
faqs.answer: A Client Manager will review your assessment and contact you within 24 hours with matched expert CVs and an indicative fee quote. There is no obligation to proceed.

faqs.question: Do you cover all areas of the UK?
faqs.answer: Yes. We have HCPC-registered psychologists and psychiatrists across England, Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland. We can also arrange assessments via video link where appropriate.

faqs.question: Is there a fee for the initial assessment and matching?
faqs.answer: No. Our initial case consultation and expert matching service is free of charge. Fees apply only when you formally instruct an expert.

faqs.question: Can I instruct a psychologist and a psychiatrist for the same case?
faqs.answer: Yes, and in some cases it is appropriate — for example, in complex care proceedings where both cognitive assessment and psychiatric diagnosis are required. We will advise on this during the matching process.

faqs.question: How long does an expert witness assessment take?
faqs.answer: Standard reports typically take 4–6 weeks from instruction. We can accommodate urgent timescales where necessary — discuss this with your Client Manager.

blocks.heading: Prefer to Speak to Someone?
blocks.bodyText: Our Client Managers have 15+ years' experience advising solicitors across family, criminal, and civil law. Call us for a no-obligation discussion about your case.
